creator: marcus@marcuscom.com
text:
On Tue, 2009-03-10 at 19:15 +0000, S Roberts wrote:
> Hello,
>       Is there an update on this PR, please?

The problem was not with gimp, but with gegl.  Gegl was just updated, so
it may be fixed.  Either way, this PR does not belong with GNOME.  I
moved it to the gegl maintainer.

Joe

> 
> Regards,
> 
> S Roberts
>
